testcase.name: test_perform_stream_request_success

failure.message: AssertionError: '' is not an instance of <class 'unittest.mock.Mock'>

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.llms.test_cohere_client.TestCohereClientStreaming testMethod=test_perform_stream_request_success> mock_api_key = <MagicMock name='api_key' id='4363794960'> mock_curl = <MagicMock name='Curl' id='4363789584'>
@patch("tinychat.llms.cohere.pycurl.Curl") @patch("tinychat.llms.base.BaseLLMClient.api_key", new_callable=MagicMock) def test_perform_stream_request_success(self, mock_api_key, mock_curl): # Setting a dummy value for mock_api_key is not strictly needed here
mock_response = Mock() mock_response.getinfo.return_value = 200 mock_curl.return_value = mock_response client = CohereClient(temperature=0.0) chat_history = [ {"role": "User", "message": "hello"}, {"role": "Chatbot", "message": "hello!"}, ] response = client.perform_stream_request("how are you?", chat_history) > self.assertIsInstance(response, Mock) E AssertionError: '' is not an instance of <class 'unittest.mock.Mock'>
tests/llms/test_cohere_client.py:24: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_stream_response_success
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.llms.test_cohere_handler.TestCohereHandlerStreaming testMethod=test_stream_response_success> mock_api_key = <MagicMock name='api_key' id='4363785216'> mock_perform_stream_request = <MagicMock name='perform_stream_request' id='4363782528'>
@patch.object(CohereClient, "perform_stream_request") @patch("tinychat.llms.base.BaseLLMClient.api_key", new_callable=MagicMock) def test_stream_response_success(self, mock_api_key, mock_perform_stream_request): # Setting a dummy value for mock_api_key is not strictly needed here
# Mocking the stream of responses mock_stream = [b'{"event_type": "text-generation", "text": "Hi!"}', b'{"event_type": "text-generation", "text": "How can I help?"}'] mock_perform_stream_request.return_value = mock_stream
handler = CohereHandler() user_input = "hello" generator = handler.stream_response(user_input)
# Collecting responses from the generator > responses = [resp for resp in generator] ^^^^^^^^^
tests/llms/test_cohere_handler.py:23: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <tinychat.llms.cohere.CohereHandler object at 0x104490050> user_input = 'hello'
def stream_response(self, user_input: str) -> Generator[str, None, None]: """ Yield stream responses from the client as they are received.
This method sends the user input to the client and then yields each piece of the language model's response as it is received in real-time. After the streaming is complete, it updates the message list with the user input and the full language model response.
:param user_input: The input string from the user to be sent to the model. :return: A generator yielding the model's response in streamed parts. """ self._chat_history.append({"role": "User", "message": user_input}) stream = self._client.perform_stream_request(user_input, self._chat_history) lm_response = "" > for response_piece in stream.splitlines(): # type: ignore ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'list' object has no attribute 'splitlines'
tinychat/llms/cohere.py:90: AttributeError
